description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a low, wide profile and a robust, angular hull. It features two large missile pods mounted on either side, each equipped with multiple launch tubes, and two prominent dual-barrel cannons extending forward from the upper structure. The vehicle is equipped with various sensors, antennae, and a large circular radar dish on the roof, suggesting advanced targeting and communication capabilities. The exterior is covered in thick, sloped armor plating with visible bolts and reinforced panels, providing substantial protection. The paint scheme is a mix of green, brown, and black in a disruptive camouflage pattern, with some metallic and blue highlights on equipment and hatches. No visible military insignia or numbers are present, and the vehicle appears to be tracked or hover-based, as no wheels or tires are visible.
description: A heavily armored, camouflaged combat vehicle with dual missile pods, twin cannons, and advanced sensor arrays. Its angular hull and reinforced plating suggest high durability and battlefield readiness.
description_view_0: Front view shows the dual missile pods, central radar dish, and forward-facing cannons, highlighting the vehicle's offensive and sensor systems.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizes the length of the missile pods, the twin cannons, and the array of sensors and antennae on the roof.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back armor, exhaust grilles, and the full extension of the cannons and missile pods.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the symmetry of the weapon mounts and the detailed structure of the vehicle's upper hull.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large missile pods with six launch tubes each mounted on the sides, and two dual-barrel cannons mounted on the upper front hull.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating, reinforced panels, and visible bolts; armor appears modular and robust, especially on the front and sides.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Disruptive camouflage pattern in green, brown, and black with angular, irregular shapes.
